workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for Dawn ResourceTable and immediates APIs with explicit feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability. Command contract explicitly sets async_diagnostics featurePolicy=emulate-when-unavailable for deterministic execution on feature-limited adapters.

timingNormalization.note: Apples-to-apples P1 resource-table contract: normalize by command-sequence sub-steps with deterministic feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: p2 lifecycle/refcount contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for AddRef lifecycle touch coverage across core object classes.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability.

timingNormalization.note: Apples-to-apples P2 lifecycle contract: normalize by addref/release touch count within the lifecycle sequence.

workloads.name: p0 render multidraw indexed contract
workloads.description: Directional indexed render-pass workload for indexed multidraw API path gating and query wiring.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability.

timingNormalization.note: Apples-to-apples indexed render contract: normalize per draw with explicit setup amortization over indexed draw stream.

workloads.name: uniform buffer update (WriteBuffer partial single)
workloads.description: Uniform update + draw benchmark aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer Partial SingleUniformBuffer variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: per-iteration upload+draw workflow and normalization aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer/Partial/SingleUniformBuffer.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn reports per-iteration metrics with iterationsPerStep=100; Fawn repeats upload+draw 100 times and normalizes to per-iteration units.

workloads.name: zero-initialize workgroup memory (256)
workloads.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: workgroup-size and iteration structure aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn executes 50 dispatch iterations per step; Fawn repeats dispatch 50 times and normalizes to per-iteration units.
